Name: -1_car_new_vehicle_driving
Representative_Docs: ["And then as we get driving, I'll show you some three new modes that we have.", 'The Clarity Electric is an early part of that effort and is designed for the EV purists, customers who want the experience of an all-electric vehicle combined with the premium quality, five-passenger sedan space and affordability of a Clarity.', 'It will be available as a hybrid with a class-leading fuel economy, a plug-in hybrid that could travel more than 25 miles on electric power, and also provide the efficiency of a conventional hybrid and an electric vehicle that has a range of 110 miles, which is the highest of any compact electric vehicle that is currently in the marketplace.']
